function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS in entities/cast and projects lanes, and used canonical cast identity plus canonical project README records.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/petra.md` identifies the personal partner (`relationship: wife`, alias `petra`). Each listed project README includes `entity.petra` under `linked_entities`, and project names were taken exactly from those README titles and sorted alphabetically.
